page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g7nex.2xlarge is a general-purpose virtual machine instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 8 dedicated physical cores on an x86_64 architecture, utilizing an Intel Xeon 8369B processor running at 2.7 GHz. The instance is configured with 32.0 GB of system memory, providing a balanced allocation of 4.0 GB per core. It does not include local storage or integrated GPUs, relying on external storage options, and delivers a baseline network bandwidth of 10 Gbps.

In benchmark evaluations, the instance demonstrates solid mid-range performance. The Intel Xeon processor achieves a stress-ng single-core score of 1853.39 and a multi-core score of 7753.77. Memory performance is highlighted by a cached read-only small block bandwidth of 427.91 GB/sec, which drops to 57.95 GB/sec for uncached large block reads, and a write bandwidth of 41.38 GB/sec. Cryptographic and compression capabilities are supported by hardware instruction sets, yielding a Passmark CPU encryption score of 7310.39 and a single-threaded gzip compression speed of 27.85 GB/sec.

With dedicated CPU allocation and a 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio, the ecs.g7nex.2xlarge offers a predictable performance profile without the resource contention typical of shared-core instances. This resource density makes it a cost-efficient option for workloads requiring stable compute and memory performance without the premium of memory-optimized or GPU-accelerated hardware. It is well-suited for general-purpose workloads, including static web serving, database operations, and multi-threaded decompression tasks.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g7nex.2xlarge is an x86_64 general-purpose instance featuring 8 dedicated Intel Xeon 8369B physical cores running at 2.7 GHz, paired with 32.0 GB of RAM. Operating on the KVM hypervisor, this instance provides a balanced 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio, 10 Gbps baseline network bandwidth, and no bundled local storage or GPUs. Benchmark results place its performance in the average tier, with a stress-ng multi-core score of 7753.77 and a Passmark CPU score of 11362.25. It demonstrates strong throughput capabilities, achieving 11.47 GB/sec in static web serving and 7.8 million operations per second in Redis SET benchmarks. This configuration is optimized for predictable, mid-range workloads such as web serving, database operations, and general-purpose application hosting where dedicated CPU execution is required without the overhead of specialized hardware.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g7nex.2xlarge is a general-purpose instance with 8 dedicated Intel Xeon cores, 32 GB RAM, and 10 Gbps network bandwidth, delivering reliable performance for web serving and databases.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g7nex.2xlarge features 8 dedicated Intel Xeon cores, 32 GB RAM, and 10 Gbps bandwidth for balanced general-purpose workloads.
tagline: A dedicated eight-core Intel Xeon instance offering balanced memory and compute for predictable general-purpose workloads and database operations.
bullet_points: 8 dedicated Intel Xeon 8369B physical cores running at 2.7 GHz
32.0 GB of system memory providing a balanced 1:4 resource ratio
10 Gbps baseline network bandwidth for reliable data transfer
No bundled local storage or GPU accelerators included
Optimized for static web serving, Redis, and database operations
